raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Valero intends to shut down its Benicia refinery by the end of April 2026.",
    "The Valero announcement follows a trend of energy companies being driven out of California by skyrocketing costs and excessive regulation.",
    "Phillips 66 announced the permanent closure of a major Los Angeles refinery, eliminating 8% of the state’s refining capacity.",
    "Chevron is relocating its headquarters from California to Houston due to Texas’s more business-friendly environment and lower regulatory burdens.",
    "The California Air Resources Board has implemented regulations that make it nearly impossible for in-state energy producers to survive.",
    "Governor Newsom and Democratic lawmakers are imposing unrealistic electric vehicle mandates and arbitrary climate goals.",
    "California's high gasoline prices and supply dilemmas are largely self-inflicted, according to a study by Michael Mische with the USC Marshall School of Business.",
    "Rising fuel prices and supply shortages impact various services including groceries, goods, fire trucks, and police patrols."
  ]
}
```
